mapper.select: select from eval_course_target_result where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select count(1) from eval_course_target_result r left join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id left join edu_semester s on s.id = t.semester_id left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id left join edu_course_objective o on o.id = r.objective_id left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id

select r.id, r.task_id, t.task_code, t.course_id, c.course_name, t.semester_id, s.semester_name, t.class_id, cls.class_name, r.objective_id, o.objective_code, o.objective_name, r.model_id, m.model_name, r.attainment_rate, r.attainment_value, r.target_value, r.result_level, r.calc_time, r.recalculation_count, r.locked_flag, r.remark from eval_course_target_result r left join teaching_task t on t.id = r.task_id left join edu_course c on c.id = t.course_id left join edu_semester s on s.id = t.semester_id left join org_class cls on cls.id = t.class_id left join edu_course_objective o on o.id = r.objective_id left join eval_model m on m.id = r.model_id
order by r.calc_time desc, r.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
